title: Lark's Soarvivor Pack
description: Simplistic survival pack with options for features from Alpha/Beta
body:
# Welcome to Lark's Soarvivor Pack for Minecraft 1.21.1
# 
Features:
- New World Generation
- Increased Ore Generation
- Custom world type to mimic the older versions of Minecraft
- Resourcepack for mimicing the look of Minecraft beta
- New animals, farming crops and villager trade currency
- Planes, ships, cars and backpacks for travellers
- Paladins Furniture
- Nostalgic Tweaks
- Custom World Names
- More to discover
